title: Commercial Project Controller / Commercial Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Einschlägige Erfahrung in Auftragsbearbeitung / kaufmännische Projektbetreuung
Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift
matched_skills: Fluent German (very good written and spoken)
missing_skills: ERP system experience (IFS or equivalent) — critical gap
Order processing and commercial project administration (Auftragsabwicklung)
ERP data entry and process chain management
key_requirements: Manage commercial processes: capture orders and project data in ERP system
Commercial review of contracts and administrative handling in coordination with internal teams
Monitor order status, deadlines, and billing positions; document project risks
Handle invoicing for projects and services
Contribute to system and process improvement
cv_highlights: USD 8M programme budget tracking at HSBC — demonstrates financial oversight capacity
Risk escalation and prioritisation management — relevant to risk documentation requirement
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination at both HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Fluent German — satisfies the primary language requirement
Power BI certified — data analysis strength, though not directly required here
gaps: No HGB or IFRS accounting knowledge — core requirement for this commercial controlling role
No ERP system experience — listed as a required skill (IFS preferred)
No formal kaufmännische Ausbildung — the baseline educational requirement
No experience in Auftragsabwicklung (order processing/commercial administration)
Location: Lüneburg is approximately 600 km from Karlsruhe — significant relocation barrier
Role is heavily accounting/commercial-admin focused, not PMO/programme governance
recommended_emphasis: Emphasise financial oversight and budget tracking (USD 8M) as proxy for commercial controlling
Highlight risk documentation and monitoring work from both HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Stress process orientation and ability to work with complex systems and cross-functional teams
German language fluency — prominently featured given the strong requirement
Willingness to relocate if genuine interest exists
recommendation: NOT RECOMMENDED. Match score 28/100. This role is a commercial/accounting controller position requiring formal kaufmännische education, ERP system proficiency, HGB/IFRS knowledge, and hands-on order processing experience — none of which are present in the candidate's profile. The PMO and project coordination background provides only peripheral relevance (risk documentation, stakeholder coordination). Combined with a ~600 km location gap, the fit is too weak to justify application effort.
